context: Tests whether the agent follows AEM EDS block file structure conventions and performance optimization patterns. Covers correct directory/file naming with kebab-case, lazy loading with IntersectionObserver, deferred heavy operations, dynamic imports for conditional modules, and proper use of aem.js utilities.

checklist.name: Correct directory path
checklist.description: The block JavaScript file is created at `blocks/{block-name}/{block-name}.js` (e.g., `blocks/video-embed/video-embed.js`), matching the block name exactly in kebab-case

checklist.name: Correct CSS file path
checklist.description: The block CSS file is created at `blocks/{block-name}/{block-name}.css` (e.g., `blocks/video-embed/video-embed.css`), matching the block name in kebab-case

checklist.name: IntersectionObserver for lazy load
checklist.description: Uses `IntersectionObserver` to defer loading the heavy embed content until the block enters the viewport (not loading immediately in the decorate function body)

checklist.name: Observer disconnect after trigger
checklist.description: After the intersection is detected and loading triggered, the observer is disconnected (`observer.disconnect()`) to avoid firing repeatedly

checklist.name: Minimal initial decoration
checklist.description: The synchronous/immediate part of decorate() does minimal work (e.g., adds placeholder UI or initializes observer) rather than eagerly fetching data or building complex DOM

checklist.name: Dynamic import for heavy module
checklist.description: Any heavy or conditionally needed JavaScript module (e.g., a third-party player library or complex renderer) is loaded via dynamic `import()` inside the observer callback or conditional branch, NOT as a top-level static import

checklist.name: aem.js imports with .js extension
checklist.description: Any import from `scripts/aem.js` uses the full relative path with `.js` extension: `import { ... } from '../../scripts/aem.js'`

checklist.name: aem.js not modified
checklist.description: The solution does NOT modify or overwrite `scripts/aem.js`; it only imports from it

checklist.name: async decorate function
checklist.description: The decorate function is declared with the `async` keyword (since it awaits operations or performs async logic)

checklist.name: Default export decorate
checklist.description: The block JS uses `export default` for the decorate function

checklist.name: Error handling on fetch
checklist.description: Any network requests (fetch) inside the block include a try/catch or .catch() error handler
